name: agile-workflow
description: Agile backlog workflow skills for Azure DevOps. Skills: decompose-backlog, validate-artifact, auto-fix-artifact, split-story, generate-work-item. Deterministic Python orchestrator for quality gates (v0.4.0). Shared rules + Azure linking guardrails.

interface.shortDescription: Azure DevOps backlog decomposition and quality gates.
interface.longDescription: Decompose Features into Stories, generate Epics/Features/Stories/Tasks with Context7-backed specs, validate artifacts with a rule-based critic, auto-fix drafts, and split oversized stories — all with Azure DevOps integration.
